verses.latin_vulgate: Et nunc ad vos mandatum hoc, o sacerdotes.
verses.douay_rheims: And now, O ye priests, this commandment is to you.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja te papit, tämä käsky tulee nyt teille.
verses.king_james: And now, O ye priests, this commandment is for you.

verses.latin_vulgate: Si nolueritis audire, et si nolueritis ponere super cor, ut detis gloriam nomini meo, ait Dominus exercituum, mittam in vos egestatem, et maledicam benedictionibus vestris, et maledicam illis, quoniam non posuistis super cor.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אִם־לֹ֣א תִשְׁמְע֡וּ וְאִם־לֹא֩ תָשִׂ֨ימוּ עַל־לֵ֜ב לָתֵ֧ת כָּב֣וֹד לִשְׁמִ֗י אָמַר֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֔וֹת וְשִׁלַּחְתִּ֤י בָכֶם֙ אֶת־הַמְּאֵרָ֔ה וְאָרוֹתִ֖י אֶת־בִּרְכוֹתֵיכֶ֑ם וְגַם֙ אָרוֹתִ֔יהָ כִּ֥י אֵינְכֶ֖ם שָׂמִ֥ים עַל־לֵֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: If you will not hear, and if you will not lay it to heart, to give glory to my name, saith the Lord of hosts: I will send poverty upon you, and will curse your blessings, yea I will curse them, because you have not laid it to heart.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ellette sitä kuule, ja ellette pane sydämeenne, että te niin antaisitte minun nimelleni kunnian, sanoo Herra Zebaot, niin minä lähetän teidän sekaanne kirouksen, ja kiroon teidän siunauksianne; jopa minä olen myös niitä kironnut, ettette sitä tahtoneet panna sydämeenne.
verses.king_james: If ye will not hear, and if ye will not lay it to heart, to give glory unto my name, saith the Lord of hosts, I will even send a curse upon you, and I will curse your blessings: yea, I have cursed them already, because ye do not lay it to heart.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce ego projiciam vobis brachium, et dispergam super vultum vestrum stercus solemnitatum vestrarum, et assumet vos secum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנְנִ֨י גֹעֵ֤ר לָכֶם֙ אֶת־הַזֶּ֔רַע וְזֵרִ֤יתִֽי פֶ֙רֶשׁ֙ עַל־פְּנֵיכֶ֔ם פֶּ֖רֶשׁ חַגֵּיכֶ֑ם וְנָשָׂ֥א אֶתְכֶ֖ם אֵלָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold, I will cast the shoulder to you, and will scatter upon your face the dung of your solemnities, and it shall take you away with it.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, minä tahdon turmella teidän siemenenne, ja paiskaan sonnan teidän kasvoillenne, teidän juhlapäiväinne sonnan, niin että se ijäksi teihin tarttuu.
verses.king_james: Behold, I will corrupt your seed, and spread dung upon your faces, even the dung of your solemn feasts; and one shall take you away with it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et scietis quia misi ad vos mandatum istud, ut esset pactum meum cum Levi, dicit Dominus exercituum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וִידַעְתֶּ֕ם כִּ֚י שִׁלַּ֣חְתִּי אֲלֵיכֶ֔ם אֵ֖ת הַמִּצְוָ֣ה הַזֹּ֑את לִהְי֤וֹת בְּרִיתִי֙ אֶת־לֵוִ֔י אָמַ֖ר יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And you shall know that I sent you this commandment, that my covenant might be with Levi, saith the Lord of hosts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin te saatte tuta, että minä sen käskyn teille lähettänyt olen, että sen piti minun liittoni Levin kanssa oleman, sanoo Herra Zebaot.
verses.king_james: And ye shall know that I have sent this commandment unto you, that my covenant might be with Levi, saith the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Pactum meum fuit cum eo vitæ et pacis : et dedi ei timorem, et timuit me, et a facie nominis mei pavebat.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּרִיתִ֣י ׀ הָיְתָ֣ה אִתּ֗וֹ הַֽחַיִּים֙ וְהַשָּׁל֔וֹם וָאֶתְּנֵֽם־ל֥וֹ מוֹרָ֖א וַיִּֽירָאֵ֑נִי וּמִפְּנֵ֥י שְׁמִ֖י נִחַ֥ת הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: My covenant was with him of life and peace: and I gave him fear: and he feared me, and he was afraid before my name.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä minun liittoni oli hänen kanssansa elämään ja rauhaan, ja minä annoin ne pelvoksi hänelle, pelkäämään minua, ja minun nimeäni hämmästymään.
verses.king_james: My covenant was with him of life and peace; and I gave them to him for the fear wherewith he feared me, and was afraid before my name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lex veritatis fuit in ore ejus, et iniquitas non est inventa in labiis ejus : in pace et in æquitate ambulavit mecum, et multos avertit ab iniquitate.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: תּוֹרַ֤ת אֱמֶת֙ הָיְתָ֣ה בְּפִ֔יהוּ וְעַוְלָ֖ה לֹא־נִמְצָ֣א בִשְׂפָתָ֑יו בְּשָׁל֤וֹם וּבְמִישׁוֹר֙ הָלַ֣ךְ אִתִּ֔י וְרַבִּ֖ים הֵשִׁ֥יב מֵעָוֺֽן׃
verses.douay_rheims: The law of truth was in his mouth, and iniquity was not found in his lips: he walked with me in peace, and in equity, and turned many away from iniquity.
verses.finnish_biblia: Totuuden laki oli hänen suussansa, ja ei löydetty mitään pahaa hänen huulissansa; hän vaelsi rauhallisesti ja toimellisesti minun edessäni, ja käänsi monta pois synnistä.
verses.king_james: The law of truth was in his mouth, and iniquity was not found in his lips: he walked with me in peace and equity, and did turn many away from iniquity.

verses.latin_vulgate: Labia enim sacerdotis custodient scientiam, et legem requirent ex ore ejus, quia angelus Domini exercituum est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־שִׂפְתֵ֤י כֹהֵן֙ יִשְׁמְרוּ־דַ֔עַת וְתוֹרָ֖ה יְבַקְשׁ֣וּ מִפִּ֑יהוּ כִּ֛י מַלְאַ֥ךְ יְהֹוָֽה־צְבָא֖וֹת הֽוּא׃
verses.douay_rheims: For the lips of the priests shall keep knowledge, and they shall seek the law at his mouth: because he is the angel of the Lord of hosts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä papin huulet pitää opin kätkemän, että lakia hänen suustansa kysyttäisiin; sillä hän on Herran Zebaotin enkeli.
verses.king_james: For the priest’s lips should keep knowledge, and they should seek the law at his mouth: for he is the messenger of the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vos autem recessistis de via, et scandalizastis plurimos in lege : irritum fecistis pactum Levi, dicit Dominus exercituum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַתֶּם֙ סַרְתֶּ֣ם מִן־הַדֶּ֔רֶךְ הִכְשַׁלְתֶּ֥ם רַבִּ֖ים בַּתּוֹרָ֑ה שִֽׁחַתֶּם֙ בְּרִ֣ית הַלֵּוִ֔י אָמַ֖ר יְהֹוָ֥ה צְבָאֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: But you have departed out of the way, and have caused many to stumble at the law: you have made void the covenant of Levi, saith the Lord of hosts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta te olette tieltä poikenneet, pahoitatte monta laissa, ja olette Levin liiton rikkoneet, sanoo Herra Zebaot.
verses.king_james: But ye are departed out of the way; ye have caused many to stumble at the law; ye have corrupted the covenant of Levi, saith the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Propter quod et ego dedi vos contemptibiles, et humiles omnibus populis, sicut non servastis vias meas, et accepistis faciem in lege.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם־אֲנִ֞י נָתַ֧תִּי אֶתְכֶ֛ם נִבְזִ֥ים וּשְׁפָלִ֖ים לְכׇל־הָעָ֑ם כְּפִ֗י אֲשֶׁ֤ר אֵֽינְכֶם֙ שֹׁמְרִ֣ים אֶת־דְּרָכַ֔י וְנֹשְׂאִ֥ים פָּנִ֖ים בַּתּוֹרָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Therefore have I also made you contemptible, and base before all people, as you have not kept my ways, and have accepted persons in the law.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sentähden olen minä myös tehnyt, että te olette hyljätyt ja ylönkatsotut kaiken kansan edessä, ettette pidä minun teitäni, mutta katsotte ihmisten muotoa laissa.
verses.king_james: Therefore have I also made you contemptible and base before all the people, according as ye have not kept my ways, but have been partial in the law.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid non pater unus omnium nostrum ? numquid non Deus unus creavit nos ? quare ergo despicit unusquisque nostrum fratrem suum, violans pactum patrum nostrorum ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲל֨וֹא אָ֤ב אֶחָד֙ לְכֻלָּ֔נוּ הֲל֛וֹא אֵ֥ל אֶחָ֖ד בְּרָאָ֑נוּ מַדּ֗וּעַ נִבְגַּד֙ אִ֣ישׁ בְּאָחִ֔יו לְחַלֵּ֖ל בְּרִ֥ית אֲבֹתֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Have we not all one father? hath not one God created us? why then doth every one of us despise his brother, violating the covenant of our fathers?
verses.finnish_biblia: Eikö meillä kaikilla ole yksi Isä? eikö yksi Jumala meitä luonut ole? Miksi me katsomme ylön toinen toisemme, ja rikomme sen liiton, joka meidän isäimme kanssa tehty oli?
verses.king_james: Have we not all one father? hath not one God created us? why do we deal treacherously every man against his brother, by profaning the covenant of our fathers?

verses.latin_vulgate: Transgressus est Juda, et abominatio facta est in Israël et in Jerusalem, quia contaminavit Juda sanctificationem Domini, quam dilexit, et habuit filiam dei alieni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּגְדָ֣ה יְהוּדָ֔ה וְתוֹעֵבָ֛ה נֶעֶשְׂתָ֥ה בְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל וּבִירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם כִּ֣י ׀ חִלֵּ֣ל יְהוּדָ֗ה קֹ֤דֶשׁ יְהֹוָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר אָהֵ֔ב וּבָעַ֖ל בַּת־אֵ֥ל נֵכָֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: Juda hath transgressed, and abomination hath been committed in Israel, and in Jerusalem: for Juda hath profaned the holiness of the Lord, which he loved, and hath married the daughter of a strange god.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä Juuda on ylönkatsojaksi tullut, Israelissa ja Jerusalemissa on tapahtunut kauhistus; sillä Juuda turmelee Herran pyhän, jota hän itse rakasti, ja ottaa vieraan jumalan tyttäriä emänniksensä.
verses.king_james: Judah hath dealt treacherously, and an abomination is committed in Israel and in Jerusalem; for Judah hath profaned the holiness of the Lord which he loved, and hath married the daughter of a strange god.

verses.latin_vulgate: Disperdet Dominus virum qui fecerit hoc, magistrum et discipulum, de tabernaculis Jacob, et offerentem munus Domino exercituum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יַכְרֵ֨ת יְהֹוָ֜ה לָאִ֨ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֤ר יַעֲשֶׂ֙נָּה֙ עֵ֣ר וְעֹנֶ֔ה מֵאׇהֳלֵ֖י יַעֲקֹ֑ב וּמַגִּ֣ישׁ מִנְחָ֔ה לַיהֹוָ֖ה צְבָאֽוֹת׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord will cut off the man that hath done this, both the master, and the scholar, out of the tabernacles of Jacob, and him that offereth an offering to the Lord of hosts.
verses.finnish_biblia: Vaan Herra hävittää hänen, joka sen tekee, Jakobin majasta, sekä opettajan että opetuslapsen, ja sen, joka vie Herralle Zebaotille ruokauhria.
verses.king_james: The Lord will cut off the man that doeth this, the master and the scholar, out of the tabernacles of Jacob, and him that offereth an offering unto the Lord of hosts.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et hoc rursum fecistis : operiebatis lacrimis altare Domini, fletu et mugitu, ita ut non respiciam ultra ad sacrificium, nec accipiam placabile quid de manu vestra.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְזֹאת֙ שֵׁנִ֣ית תַּעֲשׂ֔וּ כַּסּ֤וֹת דִּמְעָה֙ אֶת־מִזְבַּ֣ח יְהֹוָ֔ה בְּכִ֖י וַאֲנָקָ֑ה מֵאֵ֣ין ע֗וֹד פְּנוֹת֙ אֶל־הַמִּנְחָ֔ה וְלָקַ֥חַת רָצ֖וֹן מִיֶּדְכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And this again have you done, you have covered the altar of the Lord with tears, with weeping, and bellowing, so that I have no more a regard to sacrifice, neither do I accept any atonement at your hands.
verses.finnish_biblia: Te teette myös sen toisen, että Herran alttarin edessä ovat kyyneleet, itkut ja huokaukset, niin etten minä enään tahdo katsoa ruokauhria päin, eli ottaa vastaan jotakin otollisesti teidän käsistänne.
verses.king_james: And this have ye done again, covering the altar of the Lord with tears, with weeping, and with crying out, insomuch that he regardeth not the offering any more, or receiveth it with good will at your hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixistis : Quam ob causam ? Quia Dominus testificatus est inter te et uxorem pubertatis tuæ, quam tu despexisti : et hæc particeps tua, et uxor fœderis tui.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַאֲמַרְתֶּ֖ם עַל־מָ֑ה עַ֡ל כִּֽי־יְהֹוָה֩ הֵעִ֨יד בֵּינְךָ֜ וּבֵ֣ין ׀ אֵ֣שֶׁת נְעוּרֶ֗יךָ אֲשֶׁ֤ר אַתָּה֙ בָּגַ֣דְתָּה בָּ֔הּ וְהִ֥יא חֲבֶרְתְּךָ֖ וְאֵ֥שֶׁת בְּרִיתֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And you have said: For what cause? Because the Lord hath been witness between thee, and the wife of thy youth, whom thou hast despised: yet she was thy partner, and the wife of thy covenant.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja te sanotte: minkätähden? Sentähden, että Herra on sinun ja sinun nuoruutes vaimon vaiheella todistanut, jonka katsot ylön, joka on sinun kumppanis ja sinun vaimos, johon sinä liitolla itses kiinni sitonut olet.
verses.king_james: Yet ye say, Wherefore? Because the Lord hath been witness between thee and the wife of thy youth, against whom thou hast dealt treacherously: yet is she thy companion, and the wife of thy covenant.

verses.latin_vulgate: Nonne unus fecit, et residuum spiritus ejus est ? et quid unus quærit, nisi semen Dei ? custodite ergo spiritum vestrum, et uxorem adolescentiæ tuæ noli despicere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְלֹא־אֶחָ֣ד עָשָׂ֗ה וּשְׁאָ֥ר ר֙וּחַ֙ ל֔וֹ וּמָה֙ הָאֶחָ֔ד מְבַקֵּ֖שׁ זֶ֣רַע אֱלֹהִ֑ים וְנִשְׁמַרְתֶּם֙ בְּר֣וּחֲכֶ֔ם וּבְאֵ֥שֶׁת נְעוּרֶ֖יךָ אַל־יִבְגֹּֽד׃
verses.douay_rheims: Did not one make her, and she is the residue of his spirit? And what doth one seek, but the seed of God? Keep then your spirit, and despise not the wife of thy youth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä eikö hän heitä yhdeksi tehnyt, vaikka hänellä olis ollut muita henkiä? Mutta mitä se yksi tekee? Hän etsii Jumalan siementä. Sentähden karttakaat teidän henkeänne, ja älköön kenkään katsoko ylön nuoruutensa vaimoa.
verses.king_james: And did not he make one? Yet had he the residue of the spirit. And wherefore one? That he might seek a godly seed. Therefore take heed to your spirit, and let none deal treacherously against the wife of his youth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cum odio habueris, dimitte, dicit Dominus Deus Israël : operiet autem iniquitas vestimentum ejus, dicit Dominus exercituum. Custodite spiritum vestrum, et nolite despicere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־שָׂנֵ֣א שַׁלַּ֗ח אָמַ֤ר יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְכִסָּ֤ה חָמָס֙ עַל־לְבוּשׁ֔וֹ אָמַ֖ר יְהֹוָ֣ה צְבָא֑וֹת וְנִשְׁמַרְתֶּ֥ם בְּרוּחֲכֶ֖ם וְלֹ֥א תִבְגֹּֽדוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: When thou shalt hate her put her away, saith the Lord, the God of Israel: but iniquity shalt cover his garment, saith the Lord of hosts, keep your spirit, and despise not.
verses.finnish_biblia: Että (Jumala) vihaa sitä hylkäämistä, sanoo Herra Israelin Jumala, kuin joku peittää vääryytensä niinkuin vaatteella, sanoo Herra Zebaot: sentähden karttakaat teidän henkeänne, ja älkäät katsoko heitä ylön.
verses.king_james: For the Lord, the God of Israel, saith that he hateth putting away: for one covereth violence with his garment, saith the Lord of hosts: therefore take heed to your spirit, that ye deal not treacherously.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laborare fecistis Dominum in sermonibus vestris, et dixistis : In quo eum fecimus laborare ? In eo quod dicitis : Omnis qui facit malum bonus est in conspectu Domini, et tales ei placent : aut certe ubi est Deus judicii ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹגַעְתֶּ֤ם יְהֹוָה֙ בְּדִבְרֵיכֶ֔ם וַאֲמַרְתֶּ֖ם בַּמָּ֣ה הוֹגָ֑עְנוּ בֶּאֱמׇרְכֶ֗ם כׇּל־עֹ֨שֵׂה רָ֜ע ט֣וֹב ׀ בְּעֵינֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֗ה וּבָהֶם֙ ה֣וּא חָפֵ֔ץ א֥וֹ אַיֵּ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י הַמִּשְׁפָּֽט׃
verses.douay_rheims: You have wearied the Lord with your words, and you said: Wherein have we wearied him? In that you say: Every one that doth evil, is good in the sight of the Lord, and such please him: or surely where is the God of judgment?
verses.finnish_biblia: Te olette Herraa teidän puheellanne vaivanneet; ja te sanotte: missä me häntä olemme vaivanneet? Siinä kuin te sanotte: jokainen, joka pahaa tekee, se kelpaa Herralle, ja että senkaltaiset ovat hänelle otolliset; eli kussa on se Jumala, joka rankaisee?
verses.king_james: Ye have wearied the Lord with your words. Yet ye say, Wherein have we wearied him? When ye say, Every one that doeth evil is good in the sight of the Lord, and he delighteth in them; or, Where is the God of judgment?
